name: umang-harmony-theme
description: Official theme for Umang Harmony Welfare society

hero_title.default: Empowering Rural Women through Sustainable Livelihoods

hero_subtitle.default: Working with rural women in Satna, Madhya Pradesh to build home-based livelihood opportunities, strengthen financial literacy, and enable long-term economic independence.

about_section_description.default: Umang Harmony Welfare Society is a livelihood-focused organisation established in August 2024 in Satna, Madhya Pradesh, registered under the Madhya Pradesh Societies Registration Act, 1973.

flagship_section_description.default: Our flagship initiative supports 1,000 rural women from SC/ST and OBC communities to produce high-quality cotton wicks for households and temples — earning ₹1,500–₹2,000 per month from home-based work, on their own schedule.

impact_story_content.default: Meena from Nadan village in Satna had never earned a rupee of her own when she first joined the programme. Through Umang Harmony's initiative, she — along with 300 women — was trained in cotton wick-making and supported with basic financial literacy. Today, over 1,000 women are earning ₹1,500–₹2,000 per month. Meena now contributes to her household and participates in financial decisions with confidence.

footer_tagline.default: A livelihood-focused organisation working with rural women in Satna, Madhya Pradesh to build economic independence through sustainable home-based income.

footer_registration.default: Registered under M.P. Societies Registration Act, 1973. Est. August 2024, Satna, M.P.

contact_address.default: Satna / Maihar District, Madhya Pradesh, India
